description: A flexible general schema for constitutive models in atomistic simulations, allowing optional interatomic potential, defect, and deformation models, with enforced element names. Units can be freely defined by the user.

$schema.description: Reference to the schema used for this constitutive model.

interatomic_potential_name.description: Name of the interatomic potential model.

interatomic_potential_parameters.description: Parameters defining the interatomic potential model.

defect_model_name.description: Name of the defect model (e.g., 'Dislocation Mobility', 'Void Growth').

deformation_model_name.description: Name of the deformation model (e.g., 'Fracture', 'Phase Transition').

units.description: Units for different physical properties, defined by the user.
